free_bitcoin_flyers: Mapepala a Bitcoin aulere kuchokera ku bitcoin.rocks
flyers_description: Sindikizani pepala la Bitcoin kunyumba ndipo muliyike poyera kuti anthu okhala nawo pafupi aphunzire.
flyers_intro_header: MOMWE MUNGASINDIKIZIRE NDI KUTCHERA MAPEPALA A BITCOIN AWA
flyers_intro_c1: Cholinga chathu ndi kukuthandizani kubweretsa anthu ambiri ku Bitcoin poyika mapepala a Bitcoin poyera. Pepala ili ndi QR code yomwe imalumikizana ndi
flyers_intro_c4: Sindikizani pepala ili kunyumba kwanu kapena ku malo osindikizira. Kenako, liyikeni pa mabodo a zizindikiro, mitengo ya foni mdera lanu, ndi malo ena oyera pomwe anthu angathe kuliona ndi kuphunzira za Bitcoin.
flyers_intro_c5: Pomwe mukuchita izi, pemphani paketi ya
flyers_intro_c7: kuti muthandize kubweretsa anthu ambiri ku Bitcoin.
flyers_share_c1: Gawanani malo anu a mapepala nafe pa Nostr ndipo muone kumene anthu ena akuyika mapepala awo.
